description_long: This shotgun features a modern, tactical design with a predominantly black and metallic finish. The main body is robust and angular, with a large cylindrical barrel assembly and a prominent magazine well beneath. The stock is compact and integrated into the rear, with a pistol grip for ergonomic handling. A small optical sight is mounted on the top rail, suggesting enhanced aiming capabilities. The trigger guard is squared and substantial, providing protection and space for gloved fingers. The overall construction appears to be a mix of metal and polymer, giving it a sleek yet durable appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A modern, tactical shotgun with a black and metallic finish, compact stock, pistol grip, and top-mounted optic. The design is robust and angular, with a prominent barrel and squared trigger guard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow muzzle and the alignment of the barrel, with the sight and top rail barely visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the full length of the barrel, the magazine well, pistol grip, and the mounted optic on the top rail.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the compact stock and the symmetry of the shotgun, with the grip and trigger guard visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the barrel, magazine well, grip, and optic from the other side.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, cylindrical with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: squared, elongated, and robust with ample space for finger access
